prompt: Create a GitHub issue for the Ava widget/TUI space optimization work, commit only the widget files already changed with the issue ID in the commit message, then investigate and optimize the remaining Ava Presence lines 'Anti-Helpful Helper │ professional' and fleet status that consume two rows of terminal space without much value.

primary.target: GitHub issue for Ava widget/TUI space optimization

secondary.target: Ava Presence lines consuming two rows (Anti-Helpful Helper + fleet status)
Anti-Helpful Helper │ professional line and fleet status row
which widget files have already been changed

assumptions: Some widget files have already been modified and are staged or unstaged
The GitHub issue does not yet exist
The Anti-Helpful Helper line and fleet status are rendered by ava-presence widget
Two rows is considered too much vertical space for this information
The optimization direction (collapse to one row, remove, or condense) is unspecified

communications: GitHub issue: avadisabelle/ava-pi — Ava widget/TUI space optimization

east.text: Define desired TUI layout: one row vs two rows for presence/fleet info
Clarify value threshold: what information is worth showing in the status area

south.text: Identify which widget files are already changed via git status/diff
Locate Anti-Helpful Helper and fleet status rendering in ava-presence widget
Assess how many terminal rows current presence widget occupies

west.text: Verify commit only includes already-changed widget files, not unrelated changes
Confirm issue ID is correctly referenced in commit message
Validate optimized widget still renders correctly after row reduction

north.text: Create GitHub issue with scope: TUI space optimization for Ava presence widgets
Stage and commit only already-changed widget files with issue ID in message
Implement optimization: collapse Anti-Helpful Helper + fleet status to single row or remove low-value display

actionStack.text: Run git status and git diff to identify already-changed widget files
Create GitHub issue: Ava widget/TUI space optimization (Anti-Helpful Helper + fleet row reduction)
Stage only already-changed widget files (never git add -A)
Commit with message referencing issue ID
Locate Anti-Helpful Helper and fleet status rendering in ava-presence source
Assess row consumption and determine optimization strategy (collapse/remove/condense)
Implement TUI space optimization in ava-presence widget

ambiguities.text: Optimization direction unspecified: collapse two rows into one, remove entirely, or make conditional?
ambiguities.suggestion: Specify whether Anti-Helpful Helper and fleet lines should be merged into one row, hidden by default, or removed

ambiguities.text: 'without much value' is subjective — unclear if both lines should be removed or just condensed
ambiguities.suggestion: Confirm whether fleet status (💜 ○ 🏗️ ○ 🌸) has any retained value or should be dropped entirely

ambiguities.text: 'already changed' widget files — exact set unknown until git status is run
ambiguities.suggestion: Run git status first to confirm which files qualify before committing
